'''âv-k-v-l''' ('''kavakveloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backslide|backslide]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-k-v-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backslide|backslide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-k-v-l
|-
! Lemma
| kavakveloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivakveloko|thivakveloko]] || [[word:jivakveloko|jivakveloko]] || [[word:shivakveloko|shivakveloko]] || [[word:kivakveloko|kivakveloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvakveloko|thuthuvakveloko]] || [[word:jujuvakveloko|jujuvakveloko]] || [[word:shushuvakveloko|shushuvakveloko]] || [[word:kukuvakveloko|kukuvakveloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvakveloko|thuvakveloko]] || [[word:juvakveloko|juvakveloko]] || [[word:shuvakveloko|shuvakveloko]] || [[word:kuvakveloko|kuvakveloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvakveloko|thuvakveloko]] || [[word:juvakveloko|juvakveloko]] || [[word:shuvakveloko|shuvakveloko]] || [[word:kuvakveloko|kuvakveloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevakveloko|thevakveloko]] || [[word:jevakveloko|jevakveloko]] || [[word:shevakveloko|shevakveloko]] || [[word:kevakveloko|kevakveloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovakveloko|thothovakveloko]] || [[word:jojovakveloko|jojovakveloko]] || [[word:shoshovakveloko|shoshovakveloko]] || [[word:kokovakveloko|kokovakveloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovakveloko|thovakveloko]] || [[word:jovakveloko|jovakveloko]] || [[word:shovakveloko|shovakveloko]] || [[word:kovakveloko|kovakveloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovakveloko|thovakveloko]] || [[word:jovakveloko|jovakveloko]] || [[word:shovakveloko|shovakveloko]] || [[word:kovakveloko|kovakveloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvakveloko|thĂŠvakveloko]] || [[word:jĂŠvakveloko|jĂŠvakveloko]] || [[word:shĂŠvakveloko|shĂŠvakveloko]] || [[word:kĂŠvakveloko|kĂŠvakveloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavakveloko|thathavakveloko]] || [[word:jajavakveloko|jajavakveloko]] || [[word:shashavakveloko|shashavakveloko]] || [[word:kakavakveloko|kakavakveloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavakveloko|thavakveloko]] || [[word:javakveloko|javakveloko]] || [[word:shavakveloko|shavakveloko]] || [[word:kavakveloko|kavakveloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavakveloko|thavakveloko]] || [[word:javakveloko|javakveloko]] || [[word:shavakveloko|shavakveloko]] || [[word:kavakveloko|kavakveloko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
